The '''''Reprieve''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] modified as a [[Hospital ship/Legends|medical frigate]] with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. It was called on to rendezvous with and recover [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] after evacuating their base on [[Talasea]], which was attacked by a small Imperial force. Onboard the frigate, Rogue Squadron pilots [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], [[Gavin Darklighter]] and [[Andoorni Hui]] were treated for the wounds they received in the [[Raid on Talasea|fighting]] on Talasea. The ''Reprieve'' was joined by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar's]] flagship [[Home One/Legends|''Home One'']], and the Admiral flew over to the ''Reprieve'' for a memorial service for those who died on Talasea, including Rogue Squadron pilot [[Lujayne Forge]].

==Appearances==
